zh.lifeSummary: 當Julia Altoft於1155年出生在英國越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃時，她的父親Thomas Altoft27歲，母親Mrs. Eda Altoft27歲。她於1177年之前與William Constable在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Altoft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Altofts (WR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Julia Altoft was born in 1155, in Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Altoft, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Eda Altoft, was 27. She married William Constable before 1177, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: Julia Altoft(이)가 1155년 영국 요르크실르 버턴 콘스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Altoft(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Eda Altoft(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1177년 이전 영국에서 William Constable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
